# Auto-generated by .github/workflows/cli-help-extract.yml at <TIMESTAMP>
# Source: piper-plus --help
# Runtime: go
# Version: <VERSION>
Neural text-to-speech synthesis

Usage:
  piper-plus [flags]
  piper-plus [command]

Available Commands:
  completion  Generate the autocompletion script for the specified shell
  help        Help about any command
  serve       Start HTTP TTS server

Flags:
      --batch string                   batch file with one text line per utterance
  -c, --config string                  path to config.json (auto-detected if omitted)
      --custom-dict stringArray        custom dictionary JSON file paths (repeatable)
      --debug                          enable debug logging
      --device string                  inference device (cpu, cuda, coreml, directml) (default "cpu")
      --download-model string          download model by URL into cache directory
  -h, --help                           help for piper-plus
      --json-input                     read stdin as JSON lines
      --language string                language code (e.g. ja, en, zh, ko)
      --length-scale float32           speech rate (length scale) (default 1)
      --list-models                    list downloaded models in cache directory
  -m, --model string                   path to ONNX model file (or $PIPER_DEFAULT_MODEL)
      --model-dir string               model cache directory override
      --noise-scale float32            generation noise scale (default 0.667)
      --noise-w float32                duration predictor noise scale (default 0.8)
  -d, --output-dir string              output directory for generated files (default ".")
  -f, --output-file string             output WAV path (- for stdout)
      --output-raw                     output raw PCM audio to stdout (no WAV header)
      --output-timing string           write phoneme timing to file
      --phoneme-silence stringArray    per-phoneme silence (format: phoneme:seconds, repeatable)
  -q, --quiet                          disable all logging
      --reference-audio string         reference audio file for voice cloning (WAV)
      --sentence-silence float         silence between sentences in seconds (default 0.2)
  -s, --speaker int                    speaker ID for multi-speaker models
      --speaker-embedding string       pre-computed speaker embedding file (raw binary float32)
      --speaker-encoder-model string   speaker encoder ONNX model path
      --streaming                      write raw PCM int16 to stdout (no WAV header)
  -t, --text string                    text to synthesize (single utterance mode)
      --timing-format string           timing output format (json, tsv, or srt) (default "json")
      --version                        print version and exit

Use "piper-plus [command] --help" for more information about a command.
